method: max abs of leg-internal recomputed dM/dT (central interior one-sided edges)
interpretation_boundary: Numeric diagnostic only; not phase-transition strength; not cross-file physics claim.

method: T_K at argmax abs(dM/dT) along leg order
interpretation_boundary: Coordinate-like candidate only; not Tc; not transition temperature.

method: count finite leg dM/dT samples divided by leg row count minus edges per stencil policy
interpretation_boundary: Coverage metric for leg finite-difference stencil only.

method: min positive delta T_K along leg row order
interpretation_boundary: Sampling resolution descriptor for leg; not instrument audit.

method: strict monotonic flag after jitter policy inside leg

interpretation_boundary: Failure is scope/eligibility bookkeeping not physical anomaly claim.

method: count eligible vs blocked legs per file
interpretation_boundary: Counts are structural; not protocol identification.
